summary: Gatsu, the protagonist, is struggling to cope with the aftermath of a traumatic event. He receives a mysterious message from a figure known as 'Winter', who claims to have the power to grant him strength. Meanwhile, Gatsu's friend and ally, Mikasa, expresses her concern for his well-being and offers to accompany him on his journey.
key_moments: Gatsu receives a mysterious message from Winter
Mikasa expresses concern for Gatsu's well-being
Gatsu is struggling to cope with the aftermath of a traumatic event
